title: Ice Cream Scoop,7 inches Nonstick Anti-Freeze One Piece Aluminum Scooper Spoon, Heavy Duty Durable Design, Easy Clean, for Gelato, Cookie Dough, Sorbet, Almond (Silver)
features: ❤️【Heavy duty One Piece Aluminum Design】The whole spoon adopts one-piece aluminum design, which is sturdy and durable without deformation.

❤️【High-quality anti-freeze coating】 The product is made of high-quality aluminum with excellent thermal conductivity, and the surface is covered with an anti-freeze non-stick coating, which can be easily scooped using the natural warmth of the hand.

❤️【Easy to Use and Clean&Dishwasher Safe】The perfect arc design of the spoon makes it very easy to make beautiful and well-proportioned ice cream balls. The classic shape has no dead corners, easy to clean and dishwasher safe.
❤️【Multiple uses】Our spoons can be used not only for scooping ice cream, but also for fruits such as watermelon, cookie dough or sorbet.
❤️【LifHap Service】Experience the joy with every scoop,it is a good ice cream scoop,cookie scoop,candy scoop.Use our scooper without worry,if there is any problem, LifHap service always here.
